response:
TEMPERATURE IS HIGH AND THE SUN SHINES.
SUNSHINE STRIKES THE SAND WITH GREAT STRENGTH.
SAND SHINES BRIGHTLY UNDER THE SKY.
SKY IS BLUE AND SOFT.
SOFT WINDS SWEEP ACROSS THE SEA.
SEA SURF SPLASHES AGAINST THE SHORES.
SHORES ARE SILENT AS STARS SHINE.
STARS SHINE ABOVE THE SLEEPING SEA.
SLEEP IS SWEET WHEN SUN SETS.
SETS OF STARS SPARKLE IN SPACE.
SPACE IS VAST AND STILL.
ROLL OF WAVES RUSHES NOW.
